creator: supraexpress@globaleyes.net
text:
I have tested OObase-2.3.1 "--with-system-zlib" and so far - creating
the DB and exiting OObase is working just fine. I am able to reopen the
DB with the previously entered data still there (ie; it was successfully
saved). I have not done an exhaustive test, and have yet to verify
OObase-2.3.1 WITHOUT "--with-system-zlib", to confirm that the basic
"base crash" still exists. I will try that later on another FBSD system
with OO-2.3.1.
